summary: Iteration 20: Investment Logic Overhaul - All 4 features verified working. Backend APIs pass 12/12 tests. Frontend UI correctly implements compound interest calculator, editable portfolio stats, and term-based interest rates.

minor.issue: Some portfolios missing duration_unit and profit_accrual_interval fields (defaults used)

issues: Shows 'Доходность: X% годовых' (annual) in list view - consider updating to '% за срок' for consistency

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@altyncontract.kz / abc123 - PASS
Backend: GET /api/admin/portfolios returns portfolio list - PASS
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/{id}/stats returns display values (investor_count, total_invested, total_profit) - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/admin/portfolios/{id}/stats updates display values - PASS
Backend: Portfolio has returns_by_term with term-based rates - PASS
Backend: Investment with auto_reinvest uses current_balance for compound interest - PASS
Frontend: Admin portfolio form - Presentation tab shows display_investor_count, display_total_invested, display_total_profit fields - PASS
Frontend: Admin portfolio form - Returns tab shows '% за срок' label (term-based rate) - PASS
Frontend: Admin portfolio form - Profit calculator shows simple vs compound interest toggle - PASS
Frontend: Invest page - Simple interest calculation: $10,000 @ 14% = $1,400 - PASS
Frontend: Invest page - Compound interest calculation: $10,000 @ 14% = $1,484.25 - PASS
Frontend: Invest page - Shows '(сложный процент)' label when auto-reinvest enabled - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Backend calculate_profit_for_investment() correctly implements term-based rates (not annual)
Frontend calculateCompoundReturn() matches backend logic for compound interest
Admin portfolio form correctly saves display_* fields to database
Portfolio stats endpoint returns both display values and actual values for admin reference
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investment logic overhaul complete. Key changes: 1) Backend calculates profit per-period as term_rate/total_periods (not annual), 2) Compound interest uses current_balance when auto_reinvest=true, 3) Admin can edit display stats for portfolios (display_investor_count, display_total_invested, display_total_profit) in Presentation tab, 4) Frontend calculators show compound interest when auto-reinvest is enabled with '(сложный процент)' label.

compound_interest.backend: calculate_profit_for_investment() uses current_balance for auto_reinvest investments
compound_interest.frontend: calculateCompoundReturn() shows higher profit with compound formula

term_based_interest_rates.backend: returns_by_term contains rates for full term (not annual)
term_based_interest_rates.frontend_admin: Shows '% за срок' label in Returns tab
term_based_interest_rates.frontend_invest: Shows term rate in duration selector (e.g., '6 мес. — 14%')

investment_calculator.admin_calculator: Shows profit by term with simple/compound toggle

verification_screenshots: .screenshots/admin_portfolio_returns.png - Shows '% за срок' label and calculator
